characters.name: Big Dog
characters.description: TheBig Dogis one of the main dogs in the show. He doesn't talk a lot and his eyes aren't shown a lot. He is friends withLittle Dog. Big Dog is a large grey Old English Sheepdog. He is voiced by Brad Garrett. Big Dog is a large grey Old English Sheepdog (in an episode where they were in a farm, he was even able to herd sheep). He is much stronger than the Little Dog. The Big Dog is generally too lazy to bother with anything, and most of the time seemed more aloof and unconcerned about his surroundings than actually stupid. In some episodes, he surprisingly revealed deep philosophical intelligence. A running gag about the Big Dog is he would spit out a whole cob of corn he ate. In the episode Love, his name is revealed to be "Jonathan". In Space Dogs he loves pushing buttons.

characters.name: Buffy Ziegenhagen
characters.description: Buffy Ziegenhagenis a girl inKenny'sclass that he has a crush on and who has a secret crush on him. Buffy has apricot skin and long brown hair, she wears a coral shirt, a white skirt and coral shoes. She also wears a head band that's same color as her sweater, she also has black eyes and three eyelashes. Buffy is sweet and gentle (if not a bit optimistic). She likes be around Kenny, as she is quite friendly and affectionate towards him. Buffy is sweet and gentle (if not a bit optimistic). She likes be around Kenny, as she is quite friendly and affectionate towards him.

characters.name: Chief
characters.description: The Chief isSecret Squirrel,Morocco Mole, andPenny's boss, each of his employees listen to what he says. He assigns his agents to go on missions and stuff. The Chief is an ox with brown fur, peach coloured horns, and a grey snout. He wears a white undershirt, a black coat, and carries a pipe in his hand, and wears no shoes. He makes an appearance in Wacky Races (2017), except he is voiced by Billy West instead of Tony Jay.

characters.name: Cubby
characters.description: Cubby(voiced by Rob Paulsen) is a character from  2 stupid dogs. He is a fat, spotty man with big glasses, blonde hair and blue lips. In the episodes he appears in he assumes the role of a different job, likeMr. Hollywood. He has a squeaky voice and often lets off gas when excited as shown in the episode “At the Drive-In”. He helps the stupid dogs with questions and problems they have, which mainly involve food.

characters.name: Hot Rodney
characters.description: Hot Rodneyis a rooster that racedSecret Squirrelin the episode of the same name,  he attempted to get him out of the race by either losing the race or saving Morocco Mole (of which his Monkey henchman kidnapped) from being blown up by his dynamite belt.  Secret managed to distract him using a stoplight pressing the button to go repeatedly but a cop keeps writing him tickets. Then Secret and Morocco pass him and Hot Rodney catches up to them, but while Morocco tries to throw stuff at him, he accidentally unscrews the engine causing them to lose the race, and Hot Rodney wins claiming himself the winner by cheating, the trio then congratulates him by giving him the dynamite belt that he tried to use to blow up Morocco to return the favor as drives off the belt explodes as he is still the winner.

characters.name: Hot Rodney

characters.name: Kenny Fowler
characters.description: Kenny Fowleris an elementary school student who's friends with the 2 Stupid Dogs. He is voiced byJarrett Lennon. In "Show and Tell", Kenny Fowler brought his bowling ball statue to school for show and tell butBuzzbroke it at the bus station, ruining his show and tell project. Fortunately,Big DogandLittle Dogmet him and went to school with him so that they could present themselves as his show and tell. In "Substitute Teacher", Kenny gotMr. Has a substitute teacher, whenMrs. Crabfacehad a mental breakdown. Kenny Fowler is a pretty average little boy, who is as bright as he is well-behaved. Kenny obeys the rules and always does his best in all his classes, from math, to science, to history, to reading. However, he is also pretty accident prone and often times a nervous wreck, which usually results in him getting himself injured or hurt. Unfortunately, Kenny tends to be very quiet and generally avoids ever speaking up for himself, which allows him to get punished for things he didn't do. Kenny is kind and friendly to people and animals, alike. As unlikely as their friendship was, Kenny quickly became acquainted withBig DogandLittle Dog, who he likes to play with and usually relies on for help, even though he recognizes them as strays and knows they're not his own pets. That doesn't stop him from seeing them every now and then and being friends with them. Kenny has no trouble getting along with just about anybody, exceptBuzz, who regularly bullies him and uses his last name against him as an insult. Kenny also has a crush onBuffy Ziegenhagen, since he's so nervous and doubts himself so much. However, after help from the 2 Stupid Dogs, he became friends with her and gained more confidence and comfort being around her.

characters.name: Platypus
characters.description: Platypusis a character that stole electricity to power his dis-scrambling ray, but his camera-like invention accidentally turns Secret, Morocco, and The Chief into freaks causing him to flee from his own home, and the trio couldn't find a way to catch him due to their mixed up bodies. They then give the Platypus a discount haircut and a girlfriend leaving him happy.

characters.name: Red (character)
characters.description: Red(voiced byCandi Milo) is a Recurring character in the show, she has caused trouble toLittle DogandBig Dog. She appeared in 3 episodes, "Red", "Return of Red", and "Red Strikes Back." She is a parody of Little Red Riding Hood, is a small, meek little girl that the dogs often encounter. When she speaks, she shouts one word in the sentence very loudly compared to the quiet tone of voice she usually has. The dogs usually just join her for food. She needs glasses and even with them, her sight is also very short, especially when she cannot see where she is going. On one occasion the dogs have shown fear and anger towards her and the Little Dog even called her an evil little girl, one of the few times the Little Dog shows genuine intelligence. She is loud and boisterous, because, whenever she speaks, she shouts one word in the sentence very loudly compared to the quiet tone of voice she usually has. She is also unaware of her surroundings, and needs glasses and even with them, her sight is far from 20/20 when she cannot see where she is going. On one occasion the dogs have shown fear and anger towards her and the Little Dog even called her an evil little girl, one of the few times the Little Dog shows genuine intelligence.

characters.description: Current design of Secret Squirrel On 2 Stupid Dogs Secret Squirrel is a agent working at The Secret HQ, he is also known as Agent Triple O. Triple O works with Morocco mole, and works very well with him.

characters.name: The Cat
characters.description: The cat is a small yellow cat thatLittle Dogis afraid of. Sometimes, she would show up out of nowhere and unintentionally scare Little Dog. ThenBig Dogwould bark at The Cat, causing her to shriek, and freeze in fear, and fall over. In case you haven't noticed, she is stupid and ugly.

characters.name: The Witch
characters.description: The Witchis a one time character from2 Stupid Dogs, who made her only appearance in the episode "Red Strikes Back". The Witch is a villain who appeared in the episode "Red Strikes Back". She is based off of the Witch from the fairytale Hansel and Gretel. She mistaked Red for Gretel when Red, Big Dog, and Little Dog arrived to her house. Just like the Witch from the fairytale, she intends to "fatten" up those that are in her house, so she can eat them. The Witch has an ability to transform into a giant frog when eating a person, thus making her release a "frog-like" burp when transformed back into her normal self. The Witch doesn't seem to know about manners, such as when she ripped off Red's hood and hair with her teeth, Red told her to learn some manners, thus kicking her leg. It is unknown why she kicked the 2 dogs out. This coudld be, because she only needed Red to fatten up and thought they were useless. She ended up bringing them back in order to feed Red loads and loads of food to fatten her up. In the end, Big Dog, Little Dog, and Red are shown inside her stomach. The witch is a very cruel and mean person who likes to lure in people to her candy themed house, and then eats them. The witch is a very cruel and mean person who likes to lure in people to her candy themed house, and then eats them.
